files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ description: Setup Node, install pnpm dependencies, and optionally run a build s
 inputs:
   node-version:
     description: Node.js version.
-    default: "24"
+    default: "latest"
   working-directory:
     description: Directory containing package.json.
     default: "."

@@ -900,8 +900,10 @@ pnpm run oxformat
 ```
 
 `oxformat` is an alias for `oxfmt`; there is no separate `oxformat` pnpm package.
-The `CI` GitHub Actions workflow runs `pnpm run check` on pushes, pull requests,
-and manual dispatches.
+The `CI` GitHub Actions workflow uses the latest Node release and runs
+`pnpm run check` on pushes, pull requests, and manual dispatches. The check gate
+includes the full test suite, a strict changed-surface coverage threshold, and a
+full compiled-repo coverage ratchet.
 
 ## GitHub Actions Setup

@@ -50,14 +50,15 @@
     "test": "pnpm run build:all && node --test test/*.test.mjs test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
     "test:unit": "node --test test/*.test.mjs",
     "test:repair": "pnpm run build:repair && node --test test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
-    "test:coverage": "pnpm run build:all && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='dist/repair/fix-prompt-builder.js' --test-coverage-lines=85 --test-coverage-branches=85 --test-coverage-functions=85 test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
+    "test:coverage": "pnpm run build:all && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='dist/**/*.js' --test-coverage-exclude='dist/repair/*.test.js' --test-coverage-lines=49 --test-coverage-branches=66 --test-coverage-functions=57 test/*.test.mjs test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
+    "test:coverage:changed": "pnpm run build:all && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='dist/repair/fix-prompt-builder.js' --test-coverage-lines=85 --test-coverage-branches=85 --test-coverage-functions=85 test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
     "check:active-surface": "node scripts/check-active-surface.mjs",
     "lint": "oxlint src --tsconfig tsconfig.json && oxlint src/repair --tsconfig tsconfig.repair.json",
     "format": "oxfmt --write src test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.repair.json .oxfmtrc.json schema .github/workflows",
     "format:check": "oxfmt --check src test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.repair.json .oxfmtrc.json schema .github/workflows",
     "oxformat": "pnpm run format",
     "oxformat:check": "pnpm run format:check",
-    "check": "pnpm run check:active-surface && pnpm run build:all && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:repair && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run format:check"
+    "check": "pnpm run check:active-surface && pnpm run build:all && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:repair && pnpm run test:coverage:changed && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run format:check"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@types/node": "^25.6.0",
